nodes.label: Server Implementation Plan
nodes.rationale: Phased plan for building the server in html/. Phases 0-2 complete. Phases 3-10 pending. Target host: robin-gpu.cpe.ku.ac.th (Ubuntu, Debian 13, Python 3.13.5, PostgreSQL 17, TimescaleDB 2.27.0-dev).

nodes.label: FastAPI Application (html/app/)
nodes.rationale: FastAPI app in html/app/. Routers: weather.py (POST /api/v1/weather/upload), ota.py (GET /api/v1/weather/, GET /api/v1/weather/get_firmware), admin.py (/admin/*). DB via asyncpg pool. Auth: mtls.py (X-SSL-Client-Verify header) + jwt.py (bcrypt+HS256).

nodes.label: Server Phase 0: Host Provisioning
nodes.rationale: COMPLETE. Debian 13, Python 3.13.5, PostgreSQL 17, TimescaleDB 2.27.0-dev, Nginx, UFW. Runtime dirs created. TimescaleDB extension initialized in weather database.

nodes.label: Server Phase 1: Application Skeleton
nodes.rationale: COMPLETE 2026-04-26. FastAPI skeleton with /health endpoint, Pydantic config, systemd service, deployed to robin-gpu.cpe.ku.ac.th. Service active. Initial deploy via scp; git-pull deferred to Phase 10.

nodes.label: Server Phase 2: Database Schema
nodes.rationale: COMPLETE 2026-04-26. All 6 tables + schema_migrations created. weather_records hypertable confirmed. asyncpg pool initialized. DB DSN uses Unix socket for peer auth.
